emails.subject: CES needs for March
emails.body: CES needs for March CES needs 17dts/day of Mountaineer gas for the rest of March. The request was made by Kim Novesak?? I will be out this afternoon. Please call Brian Perrone (703-561-6486) or Scott Goodell at 713-853-7711. Thanks

emails.subject: Re: CES needs for March
emails.body: Re: CES needs for March I have no contacts to buy from. Mountaineer production is normally sold on term deals. Chris Germany@ECT 03/13/2000 09:36 AM

emails.subject: Re: CES needs for March
emails.body: We have WV produced TCo. To my knowledge we have no Mountaineer. CES never wanted to buy Mountaineer production because of the daily balancing for both the production and the end-user side. John Chris Germany@ECT 03/13/2000 10:14 AM
